vocab.meaning: sự hưng phấn/kích thích tột độ
vocab.example: I’m a huge fan of mountain biking because of the rush of adrenaline I get when navigating steep slopes.

vocab.meaning: hưởng những lợi ích từ cái gì đó
vocab.example: By swimming regularly, I can reap the benefits of a full-body workout without putting too much strain on my joints.

vocab.meaning: củng cố khả năng phục hồi/kiên cường về tinh thần
vocab.example: Marathon running isn't just a physical test; it’s a way to fortify mental resilience and discipline.

vocab.meaning: sự gắng sức về thể chất
vocab.example: After a week of intense mental labor at the office, I find that rigorous physical exertion through football is the best remedy.

vocab.meaning: sự phối hợp giữa tay và mắt
vocab.example: Table tennis is my go-to sport as it’s incredibly effective at sharpening one's hand-eye coordination.

vocab.meaning: một môn thể thao thu hút người xem
vocab.example: While I enjoy playing basketball, I think American football is a much more thrilling spectator sport to watch live.

vocab.meaning: kỹ năng/năng lực thể thao xuất sắc
vocab.example: I’ve always admired the athletic prowess of professional gymnasts and their incredible flexibility.

vocab.meaning: thư giãn sau một ngày bận rộn
vocab.example: Hitting a few balls at the driving range is a fantastic way for me to unwind after a hectic day at school.

vocab.meaning: nuôi dưỡng tinh thần đồng đội/tình bạn thân thiết
vocab.example: What draws me to team sports like volleyball is the way they foster a sense of camaraderie among players.
To combat the negative effects of a sedentary lifestyle, I make it a point to play badminton at least twice a week.
